note: feature/seq=1: install ICP ranker as a bounded background timer (atlas-icp-rank.timer, every 2min, batch 120k, capped). Tags atlas.business.icp_tier (A=attorneys/dentists/med-spas/derm/cosmetic/accountants/CPA/real-estate/insurance/financial/vet/chiro/optometry; B=other pro-services/healthcare/digital; C=rest) so prospects surface the RIGHT targets first. Additive column; set-based UPDATE; exits 0. Parallel feature lane — cannot block the main/flat pipe.

steps.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""ATLAS ICP ranker -- tags atlas.business.icp_tier so prospects surface the RIGHT
targets first (A = high-ticket pro services the user named: attorneys, dentists,
med-spas, derm/cosmetic, accountants/CPA, real estate, insurance, financial advisors,
vets, optometry, chiro). B = other pro-services/healthcare/digital-first. C = rest.
Additive column (ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS), bounded batches, exits 0 (never wedges).
Run repeatedly by a background timer until all rows are tiered; publishes icp-rank.json."""
import os,sys,re,json,time,base64,urllib.request,urllib.error,traceback
sys.path.insert(0,"/opt/atlas/importers")
BATCH=int(os.environ.get("ICP_BATCH","120000"))
A=r"attorney|lawyer|law firm|law office|law group|\blaw\b|legal|llp|paralegal|dentist|dental|orthodont|endodont|periodont|oral surg|med ?spa|medspa|dermatolog|\bderm\b|cosmetic|plastic surg|aesthetic|botox|lasik|accountant|\bcpa\b|accounting|bookkeep|tax service|real estate|realtor|realty|\bbroker|insurance agen|insurance brok|financial advis|wealth manage|chiropract|optometr|\bvet\b|veterinar|physical therapy|fertility|orthoped|plastic surgeon"
B=r"clinic|medical|\bhealth|therapy|counsel|psycholog|consult|advisory|\bagency\b|software|saas|marketing|web design|studio|practice|wellness|\bspa\b|salon|fitness|gym|coaching|recruit|staffing|architect|engineer|surgeon|physician|doctor|urgent care"
def gh_put(obj):
    tok=os.environ.get("STATUS_TOKEN");repo=os.environ.get("STATUS_REPO")
    if not tok or not repo: return
    url="https://api.github.com/repos/%s/contents/status/hetzner/icp-rank.json"%repo
    for _ in range(5):
        sha=None
        try:
            rr=urllib.request.Request(url+"?ref=main",headers={"Authorization":"Bearer "+tok,"User-Agent":"atlas","Accept":"application/vnd.github+json"});sha=json.load(urllib.request.urlopen(rr,timeout=20)).get("sha")
        except Exception: sha=None
        b={"message":"icp-rank","content":base64.b64encode(json.dumps(obj,indent=1,default=str).encode()).decode(),"branch":"main"}
        if sha:b["sha"]=sha
        try:
            rq=urllib.request.Request(url,data=json.dumps(b).encode(),method="PUT",headers={"Authorization":"Bearer "+tok,"User-Agent":"atlas","Content-Type":"application/json","Accept":"application/vnd.github+json"});urllib.request.urlopen(rq,timeout=25);return
        except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
            if e.code==409: time.sleep(1.3); continue
            return
        except Exception: return
def main():
    out={"kind":"icp-rank","ts":int(time.time())}
    try:
        import socrata_import as si
        try: si.load_db_env(si.DB_ENV_PATH)
        except Exception: pass
        c=si.connect_pg(); c.autocommit=True; cur=c.cursor()
        cur.execute("ALTER TABLE atlas.business ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS icp_tier text")
        # bulk, set-based classification (fast; not row-by-row), bounded by a CTE LIMIT
        cur.execute("""
            WITH batch AS (
              SELECT id FROM atlas.business WHERE icp_tier IS NULL LIMIT %s
            )
            UPDATE atlas.business b SET icp_tier = CASE
              WHEN (coalesce(b.name,'')||' '||coalesce(b.category,'')) ~* %s THEN 'A'
              WHEN (coalesce(b.name,'')||' '||coalesce(b.category,'')) ~* %s THEN 'B'
              ELSE 'C' END
            FROM batch WHERE b.id = batch.id
        """,(BATCH,A,B))
        out["classified_this_run"]=cur.rowcount
        cur.execute("SELECT icp_tier,count(*) FROM atlas.business WHERE icp_tier IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1")
        out["tier_totals"]={k:int(v) for k,v in cur.fetchall()}
        cur.execute("SELECT icp_tier,count(*) FROM atlas.business WHERE qa_status='pass' GROUP BY 1")
        out["prospects_by_tier"]={k:int(v) for k,v in cur.fetchall()}
        cur.execute("SELECT count(*) FROM atlas.business WHERE icp_tier IS NULL")
        out["remaining_untiered"]=int(cur.fetchone()[0])
        c.close(); out["status"]="ok"
    except Exception as e:
        out["status"]="err"; out["error"]=str(e)[:300]; out["trace"]=traceback.format_exc()[-900:]
    gh_put(out)
    print("ICP=%s"%json.dumps({k:out.get(k) for k in("classified_this_run","tier_totals","prospects_by_tier","remaining_untiered","status")}))
    sys.exit(0)
if __name__=="__main__": main()

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS ICP ranker (bounded background)
After=postgresql.service

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Environment=ICP_BATCH=120000
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_icp_rank.py
TimeoutStartSec=240
MemoryMax=600M
Nice=10

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS ICP ranker cadence

[Timer]
OnBootSec=1min
OnUnitInactiveSec=2min
Persistent=true

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target
